start.speaker: Old Hanna
start.text: Oh my old bones. These fields don't tend themselves, but they might as well have to these days.

ask_help.speaker: Old Hanna
ask_help.text: You look strong. Could you spare a moment to help an old woman with her harvest?

choices.text: Of course, I'd be glad to help.
What would I need to do?

explain_task.speaker: Old Hanna
explain_task.text: Just gather five bundles of wheat from the south field. My back can't take the bending anymore. I'll make it worth your while — seeds for your own garden.

accept_help.speaker: Old Hanna
accept_help.text: Bless you, dear. The south field is just past the fence. The wheat is ready — golden heads, you can't miss them.

decline.speaker: Old Hanna
decline.text: Oh well. These old hands will manage somehow. Come back if you change your mind.
